articles.title: Weather Update: Heat intensifies in Delhi, UP, Bihar and Rajasthan as temperatures reach 36°C; Check state-wise weather forecast here - news24online.com
articles.search_term: ("mercury soars" OR "mercury crosses" OR "temperature soars" OR "record temperature" OR "all-time high" OR "degrees Celsius" OR "maximum temperature" OR "hottest day") Bihar
articles.full_text:
New Delhi: February is not over yet, but summer-like heat has already started in many parts of North India. States like Delhi, Uttar Pradesh, Bihar, and Rajasthan are seeing a quick rise in daytime temperatures. In some parts of Rajasthan, the maximum temperature has crossed 36°C.
What will the weather be like in Delhi-NCR today?
The weather in Delhi-NCR is gradually changing. According to the India Meteorological Department (IMD), both maximum and minimum temperatures will gradually increase in the coming days. However, strong surface winds are also expected during the day.
According to the IMD, the maximum temperature on February 26th is expected to be 31 degrees Celsius and the minimum temperature 14 degrees Celsius.
On February 27th, the maximum temperature is expected to reach 32 degrees Celsius and the minimum temperature 15 degrees Celsius.
Uttar Pradesh Weather Today: Heat Rising, No Rain Alert
According to the Meteorological Department, there is no rain warning for Uttar Pradesh today. However, temperatures are expected to rise in many districts.
The districts in Uttar Pradesh where the heat is expected to increase include Kanpur, Meerut, Lucknow, Agra, Aligarh, Etawah, Mainpuri, Mathura, Amethi, Azamgarh, Amroha, Baghpat, Bahraich, Ballia, and Balrampur.
In Lucknow, the maximum temperature tomorrow will be 29 degrees Celsius, and the minimum temperature will be 14 degrees Celsius.
Bihar Weather Today: Clear Skies, Heat to Intensify
According to the IMD, the weather in Bihar will be clear today. There is no possibility of rain. Meanwhile, Bihar is about to experience the intense heat.
The districts where the heat will wreak havoc include Bhagalpur, Munger, Purnia, Khagaria, Begusarai, Bhagalpur, Bhojpur, Darbhanga, East Champaran, West Champaran, Jamui, and Jehanabad.
In Patna, the maximum temperature tomorrow will be 29 degrees Celsius and the minimum temperature will be 15 degrees Celsius.
Rajasthan Weather Today: Barmer Above 36°C, Dry Conditions Ahead
Rajasthan is already feeling the full force of summer heat. The maximum temperature in Barmer has crossed 36 degrees Celsius, which is unusually high for February.
According to the Meteorological Center, Jaipur, the weather in the state will remain dry in the coming days.
Day temperatures are being recorded above 30 degrees Celsius in many cities, including Ajmer, Alwar, Jaipur, Pilani, Jodhpur, Phalodi, Bikaner, and Churu.
Tamil Nadu Weather Today: Rain, Fog, and Rising Temperatures
The weather in Tamil Nadu is quite different from North India. Chennai and the surrounding districts will see light fog in the morning. Rain is forecast for several parts of Tamil Nadu until March 1st.
A low-pressure area in the Bay of Bengal has weakened, but its leftover moisture is keeping the weather unstable. This may bring moderate rain to parts of southern and northern Tamil Nadu. Puducherry and Karaikal are also expected to receive light to moderate rain.
Districts likely to see morning fog include: Tiruvallur, Kanchipuram, Salem, Dharmapuri, Krishnagiri, Tirupattur, Vellore, and Ranipet.
IMD has also warned that maximum temperatures in Tamil Nadu and Puducherry may remain 2 to 3 degrees Celsius above normal until February 28th.
Sikkim Snowfall: 2,700 Stranded Tourists Rescued Safely
In a major rescue operation, more than 2,736 tourists who were stranded near Tsomgo Lake in East Sikkim due to heavy snowfall were successfully rescued.
Heavy snowfall in Sherathang and surrounding higher altitude areas had blocked roads, leaving 541 tourist vehicles stuck between the 15th Mile and Tsomgo Lake. Through a well-coordinated rescue effort, all tourists were evacuated safely.
